HMAC-SHA256.code:
def generate(payload, passcode, custom_data=None, key_order=None):
    import hmac
    import hashlib

    debug_log = "--- HASHING PROCESS DEBUG ---\n"
    debug_log += "Algorithm: HMAC-SHA256\n"

    if key_order:
        keys_to_sign = key_order
        debug_log += "[1] Using Custom Keys Order: " + str(keys_to_sign) + "\n"
    else:
        keys_to_sign = [k for k in payload.keys() if k != 'hash']
        debug_log += "[1] Using Extracted Keys Order: " + str(keys_to_sign) + "\n"

    concat_str = ""
    debug_log += "\n[2] Concatenating Values:\n"
    for k in keys_to_sign:
        val = payload.get(k)
        if val is None: val = ""
        debug_log += "    - {} = '{}'\n".format(k, val)
        concat_str += str(val)

    debug_log += "\n[3] Final Concatenated String:\n    -> '{}'\n".format(concat_str)
    debug_log += "\n[4] Generating HMAC-SHA256 signature...\n"
    debug_log += "    Key: '{}'\n".format(passcode)

    signature = hmac.new(
        passcode.encode('utf-8'),
        concat_str.encode('utf-8'),
        hashlib.sha256
    ).hexdigest()

    debug_log += "\n[5] Result:\n    -> {}\n".format(signature)
    return signature, debug_log
HMAC-SHA256.description: HMAC-SHA256: Signs concatenated payload values with a secret key. Returns hex digest.

SHA-256.code:
def generate(payload, passcode, custom_data=None, key_order=None):
    import hashlib

    debug_log = "--- HASHING PROCESS DEBUG ---\n"
    debug_log += "Algorithm: SHA-256 (plain, no key)\n"

    if key_order:
        keys_to_sign = key_order
        debug_log += "[1] Using Custom Keys Order: " + str(keys_to_sign) + "\n"
    else:
        keys_to_sign = [k for k in payload.keys() if k != 'hash']
        debug_log += "[1] Using Extracted Keys Order: " + str(keys_to_sign) + "\n"

    concat_str = ""
    debug_log += "\n[2] Concatenating Values:\n"
    for k in keys_to_sign:
        val = payload.get(k)
        if val is None: val = ""
        debug_log += "    - {} = '{}'\n".format(k, val)
        concat_str += str(val)

    debug_log += "\n[3] Final Concatenated String:\n    -> '{}'\n".format(concat_str)
    debug_log += "\n[4] Generating SHA-256 hash...\n"

    digest = hashlib.sha256(concat_str.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
    debug_log += "\n[5] Result:\n    -> {}\n".format(digest)
    return digest, debug_log
SHA-256.description: SHA-256: Plain SHA-256 hash of concatenated payload values. No secret key required.
